title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, discusses how her AI performance management platform competes against much larger enterprises by building a complete platform rather than incremental features. She reflects on discovering that even Google relied on spreadsheets for strategic planning, and shares hiring and trust-building strategies that enabled Pigment to win customers like Figma, Brex, and Anthropic.
writeup: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, explains how the AI performance management platform competes against far larger legacy enterprise software vendors. The core strategy is building a comprehensive platform from day one rather than shipping a single feature, a bet on breadth as a differentiator in enterprise AI. Crespo covers enterprise sales tactics, the role of customer trust and brand validation in winning accounts, and hiring philosophy treated as a competitive advantage.
